chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1935 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 7358/2022 For orders on office objection For orders on M.A. 7359/2022 For hearing of main case 01.06.2022 Mr. Manu Menghwar, advocate for petitioners. ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. On the strength of the statement of proposer and seconder, who appeared at the time of scrutiny wherein they have stated that neither they signed nor endorsed their thumb impression as being proposer and seconder, the nomination papers were rejected. Since the proposer and seconder themselves appeared, there is no reason to interfere with the orders of Election Appellate Authority based on concurrent findings. No interference under Article 199 of the Constitution could be called and the petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
